question: How did understanding grow with the code?
title: Project timeline
summary: From an empty repo with two guide chapters to six months of collective memory—nothing reconstructed from git archaeology.

scenes.headline: This was not generated afterwards.
scenes.body: VibeKB was initialized on day one. Each phase below added code and captured reasoning in the same stretch of work. The guide you see now is month six—not a retrofit.

scenes.label: Four phases of the same repository
scenes.description: Select a phase. Notice what existed, what was captured, and how small the guide started.

phases.title: Initialize VibeKB
phases.narrative: New repository. Developer runs VibeKB init. Project Guide has two chapters: purpose and stack intent. One decision recorded: SQLite for a single operator on cPanel.
captured: Purpose: one person capturing SaaS ideas

phases.title: First features ship
phases.narrative: AI implements ideas CRUD in Cursor sessions. Same week: save-path alignment documented, no-auth boundary reinforced, mental model for ideas-as-records written.

snapshots.label: Guide size
snapshots.text: 4 chapters including user journey and save flow

snapshots.label: Application
snapshots.text: List, create, edit ideas with title and notes

snapshots.label: Incident prevented
snapshots.text: Form/write/read alignment checklist before status field

captured: Save path: five places must agree

phases.title: Volume and pressure
phases.narrative: Thousands of lines from many AI sessions. Status field, priority sort, debugging guides. PostgreSQL and half-auth suggested repeatedly—reasoning captured each time so debates did not restart.

snapshots.label: Real debug path
snapshots.text: Blank list after deploy → sqlite deploy exclusion documented

captured: Risks: schema drift, multi-user without ownership

phases.title: Still makes sense
phases.narrative: Repository works on cPanel. New developer—or future you—opens the Project Guide and understands why before reading every file. Technical reference exists for depth; collective memory exists for intent.

snapshots.label: Guide size
snapshots.text: 8 chapters you are walking through now

snapshots.label: Knowledge base
snapshots.text: Decisions, sessions, lessons, handoff notes, debugging paths

snapshots.label: Test
snapshots.text: Can you answer “why no auth?” without opening a chat log?

captured: Full feature timeline with rejected approaches
